_description: This file defines the hardware-inventory schema BuildFindr uses. 'example_inventory' is a sample maker's parts bin. The plan_build tool accepts an inventory in this format and reasons about which project components the user already owns versus still needs to buy.

items.id: string - unique identifier for this item
items.name: string - short description of the part
items.category: string - one of: board, camera, sensor, actuator, power, accessory
items.notes: string (optional) - condition, how it's set up, etc.

items.name: Raspberry Pi Camera v2 (IMX219, CSI)
items.notes: Works with the Nano CSI port

items.name: 5V/4A barrel-jack power supply
items.notes: J48 power-select jumper set for barrel-jack mode

empty_inventory._note: Use this as the starting template for a new maker with no parts entered yet.
